goal_instruction: You are on the LatticeWorks employee IT portal. Reach the Privileged Access Recovery Exception Form page.

it_home.title: LatticeWorks IT Portal
it_home.text: The IT portal supports identity access, device support, service desk requests, and urgent recovery workflows.

links.label: Identity and Access
links.preview_text: Account access, elevated permissions, and recovery workflows.

links.label: Service Desk
links.preview_text: General IT issues, ticket routing, and hardware requests.

links.label: Remote Work Tools
links.preview_text: VPN, conferencing, and remote sign-in support.

identity_access.title: Identity and Access
identity_access.text: Identity and Access covers account resets, privileged access, security reviews, and recovery exceptions.

links.label: Access Recovery
links.preview_text: Recover locked or broken access, including elevated-access cases.

links.label: Privileged Access
links.preview_text: Request or review privileged roles and time-bound elevation.

links.label: Password Reset
links.preview_text: Reset or unlock a standard employee password.

access_recovery.title: Access Recovery
access_recovery.text: Access Recovery includes account unlocks, device-based recovery, administrative reactivation, and exception paths.

links.label: Elevated Access Exceptions
links.preview_text: Exception handling for privileged access recovery and admin break-glass workflows.

links.label: Standard Account Unlock
links.preview_text: Routine account unlocks for standard users.

links.label: Service Desk Escalation
links.preview_text: Escalate a ticket for manual handling.

elevated_access_exceptions.title: Elevated Access Exceptions
elevated_access_exceptions.text: Use Elevated Access Exceptions for privileged admin recovery, emergency exceptions, and break-glass approvals.

links.label: Privileged Access Recovery Exception Form
links.aria_label: Open privileged access recovery exception form
links.preview_text: Form required for privileged account recovery and temporary exception approval.

links.label: Approval Checklist
links.preview_text: Checklist for sponsor approval and security verification.

links.label: Access Recovery
links.preview_text: Back to the recovery options hub.

privileged_access.title: Privileged Access
privileged_access.text: Privileged Access includes role requests, just-in-time elevation, and admin account reviews.

password_reset.title: Password Reset
password_reset.text: Reset a forgotten password or unlock a standard employee account.

standard_account_unlock.title: Standard Account Unlock
standard_account_unlock.text: Routine account unlock for standard users without privileged access.

service_desk.title: Service Desk
service_desk.text: The Service Desk routes general IT issues, tickets, device requests, and software problems.

links.label: Identity and Access
links.preview_text: Account access, resets, and security workflows.

service_desk_escalation.title: Service Desk Escalation
service_desk_escalation.text: Manual escalation queue for tickets that cannot be resolved automatically.

remote_work_tools.title: Remote Work Tools
remote_work_tools.text: Remote work support for VPN, virtual desktop, and conferencing access.

links.label: IT Portal Home
links.preview_text: Back to the main IT portal.

approval_checklist.title: Approval Checklist
approval_checklist.text: Checklist for security sponsor approval, manager sign-off, and emergency justification.

privileged_access_recovery_exception_for.title: Privileged Access Recovery Exception Form
privileged_access_recovery_exception_for.text: This page contains the official exception form for privileged access recovery.
